component.name: fifine Control Deck
component.summary: Control a Stream Dock style macro keypad

description.p: A native Linux control application for the fifine Control Deck — a Mirabox / Hotspot "Stream Dock" style macro keypad with per-key LCDs (USB 3142:0060).

Draw icons and labels on the keys and bind them to actions: launch apps, send hotkeys, type text, media and volume control, run scripts, brightness, page and profile switching, folders and multi-step macros — via a PyQt6 configuration GUI.

screenshot.caption: Actions catalog, the live key grid with system-monitor keys, and the key-settings panel
Editing a key: icon, colours, label and the assigned action

description.p: Dark-mode color dialog fix and synchronous --quit
Press-and-hold key actions, one-click GPU temperature, clock formats
Monitor keys round 2 (GPU load, temperatures, clock), gauge legibility, Flatpak autostart via the Background portal
Icon picks stick for good (provenance tracking) plus a 25-fix editor audit and legacy-ydotool typing fix
Library icon picker fix, plus Flatpak config persistence and font fallback
System monitor keys: live CPU, RAM, VRAM, network and disk readouts on key LCDs as numbers, gauges or graphs
Security and data-safety release: udev uaccess fix, passwords off argv, folder and keyring data-loss fixes, enforced single instance
Classic snap that drives the deck, with a one-click button to enable device access.
Fixed a Qt/Wayland startup warning by setting the app identity before QApplication.
Restored netlink USB hotplug by recommending python3-pyudev.
Folders, multi-action editor, production hardening; amd64 + arm64.
